positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a serene forest spirit emerging from glowing bioluminescent moss and intricate roots. The spirit has flowing, abstract human-like features and is composed of ethereal white and pale teal light. The composition should feature clean silhouettes, strong contrast against a deep indigo background, and geometric floral patterns integrated into the natural elements. Focus on high-contrast outlines and a central, balanced composition suitable for a wearable art print. Highly detailed, vector illustration style, ambient glow, volumetric light, crisp lines, maximalism meets minimalism.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grain, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, complex background, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, writing, dirty
